---
name: 💡 Request a Feature (EPIC)
about: Have an epic idea for a new Minecraft utility? Suggest it here!
title: "[EPIC] "
labels: enhancement, epic
assignees: DevFrisly
---

### 🚀 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually calculate how many iron blocks I need for a level 4 beacon...")

### ✨ Describe the solution you'd like
Tell the Forge Master exactly what you want to see built. (e.g., "I would love a Beacon Calculator tool on AméthMC where I can input my desired beacon level and get the exact stack count required.")

### 🔀 Describe alternatives you've considered
Are there other ways you are currently solving this? (e.g., "Right now I just use a spreadsheet or guess and mine too much iron.")

### 🎨 Additional Context or Mockups
Add any other context, links to similar tools, or visual mockups of the UI you are imagining here!

---
**Note:** AméthMC is a passion project maintained by one developer. While every epic scroll is read, not every feature can be forged immediately!
